name: base44-sandbox
description: Develop a Base44 app remotely in Base44's cloud sandbox; conventions only, no deploy/push.

interface.shortDescription: Develop Base44 apps remotely in the cloud sandbox from Codex
interface.longDescription: Develop a Base44 app inside Base44's cloud sandbox where the platform auto-builds, auto-commits, and auto-syncs. Includes conventions for entities, functions, agents, and connectors, SDK development, and production troubleshooting — without deploy/push commands.
